data.body: Certified PASS advisory disposition: f403fa5c7f629d2c3 accepted as an implementation-time obligation—the named AST test is new work and must pass before merge; the prose is normative post-implementation, not a claim it exists today. f01305c3875edc453 deferred by planned integration order: 5967 completes phase_status before any renderer/close consumer ships, and the feature branch is not deployed between stories. ff63bba8c623d0526 accepted: implementation must add mixed-status aggregation cases to test_attestation_invalidation under the already-specified severity contract. fb59727dfac76fbbf/f607dd457c67f9209 are non-blocking size/style diagnostics; the story remains cohesive around one validity boundary. f8ffaaf338260cea2 clarified: the parser raises ReviewedRelatedMaterialError internally and consumers catch it; the AC explicitly says it does not escape the consumer boundary. f926fb6b430dae104 is already co-located in the helper contract with exact mapping. ff0782a801ad45631 is inapplicable to compute_validity: signed manifests use manifest_pins; the sidecar parser is only for resign recovery. f30cacf63527ae667 is handled operationally: rollback removes enforce_plan_material_pins from project config before deploying an older strict-schema binary. No signed material change is required.
